'''nadufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wussette|wussette]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wussette|wussette]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nadufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædifith|nædifith]] || [[word:nædifij|nædifij]] || [[word:nædifish|nædifish]] || [[word:nædifi|nædifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadudufuth|nadudufuth]] || [[word:nadudufuj|nadudufuj]] || [[word:nadudufush|nadudufush]] || [[word:nadudufu|nadudufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadufuth|nadufuth]] || [[word:nadufuj|nadufuj]] || [[word:nadufush|nadufush]] || [[word:nadufu|nadufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:naduffuth|naduffuth]] || [[word:naduffuj|naduffuj]] || [[word:naduffush|naduffush]] || [[word:naduffuf|naduffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadufuthu|nadufuthu]] || [[word:nadufuju|nadufuju]] || [[word:nadufushu|nadufushu]] || [[word:nadufuku|nadufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadufuth|nadufuth]] || [[word:nadufuj|nadufuj]] || [[word:nadufush|nadufush]] || [[word:nadufu|nadufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadufuthul|nadufuthul]] || [[word:nadufujul|nadufujul]] || [[word:nadufushul|nadufushul]] || [[word:nadufukul|nadufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadufuthuthu|nadufuthuthu]] || [[word:nadufujuju|nadufujuju]] || [[word:nadufushushu|nadufushushu]] || [[word:nadufuku|nadufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadufuthun|nadufuthun]] || [[word:nadufujun|nadufujun]] || [[word:nadufushun|nadufushun]] || [[word:nadufukun|nadufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadufuthuoro|nadufuthuoro]] || [[word:nadufujuoro|nadufujuoro]] || [[word:nadufushuoro|nadufushuoro]] || [[word:nadufukuoro|nadufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
